summary: Iteration 94 - Sprint Features Testing completed. All 7 backend tests passed. Frontend components compile without errors. Verified: 1) on-demand-toggle accepts spot_id and spot_name, 2) on-demand-status returns spot_name and spot_id, 3) dispatch/request enforces current-day-only for immediate requests, 4) NumericStepper max limit supports 999.
critical_code_review_comments: Backend on-demand-toggle correctly accepts spot_id and spot_name parameters and stores them
Backend on-demand-status correctly returns spot_name and spot_id in response
Backend dispatch/request correctly enforces current-day-only for immediate requests (is_immediate=True)
Backend dispatch/request correctly requires 24-hour lead time for scheduled requests (is_immediate=False)
NumericStepper component has max=999 as default, supporting the 999 media limit requirement
SurferSessionHub.js compiles without errors and integrates SpotSelector correctly
SpotSelector.js compiles without errors and provides in-drawer spot selection
CrewPaymentCard.js compiles without errors and displays PENDING_PAYMENT status
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint features verified: 1) In-drawer spot selection for On-Demand toggle works via SpotSelector component integrated in SurferSessionHub, 2) 999 media limit supported via NumericStepper max=999 default, 3) PENDING_PAYMENT status displayed via CrewPaymentCard component, 4) Current-day-only enforcement for On-Demand requests implemented in dispatch.py. All backend APIs working correctly.

features_verified.on_demand_toggle_spot_params: VERIFIED - POST /api/photographer/{id}/on-demand-toggle accepts spot_id and spot_name
features_verified.on_demand_status_spot_info: VERIFIED - GET /api/photographer/{id}/on-demand-status returns spot_name and spot_id
features_verified.dispatch_current_day_enforcement: VERIFIED - POST /api/dispatch/request rejects immediate requests for future dates
features_verified.dispatch_24h_lead_time: VERIFIED - POST /api/dispatch/request requires 24h lead time for scheduled requests
features_verified.numeric_stepper_max_999: VERIFIED - NumericStepper component has max=999 default
